dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.text: As part of your registration for Trail des Mouflons d'Or 2026, we collect personal data necessary for the proper organization of the event.

websiteData.title: Website Data

items.session: Session cookies required for the proper functioning of the website.
items.analytics: Anonymous analytics data to improve the user experience.
items.performance: Performance data to optimize site loading times.

websiteData.note: This data is collected anonymously and cannot be used to personally identify you.

dataUsage.title: Use of Your Data

items.registration: Processing and managing your event registration.
items.bib: Assigning your bib number and managing race logistics.
items.communication: Communicating important information about the event (schedule changes, safety instructions, etc.).
items.medical: Managing medical emergencies during the event.

dataUsage.noMarketing: Your data will never be used for marketing or commercial prospecting purposes.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing

items.satim: SATIM: solely for the purpose of securely processing your electronic payment.
items.officials: Race officials and timekeepers: for organizing the event and publishing results.
items.authorities: Competent authorities: only when required by law or in case of a medical emergency.

dataSharing.noSale: Your personal data is never sold or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security

items.ssl: All communications between your browser and our servers are encrypted via SSL/TLS.
items.satim: Payments are processed securely through SATIM. We never store your bank card details.
items.access: Access to personal data is strictly limited to authorized members of the organizing team.

dataSecurity.note: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.text: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this policy regularly.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Links
thirdParty.text: Our website may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external sites. We encourage you to read their privacy policies before providing any personal information.

contact.title: Contact & Your Rights
contact.rights: In accordance with applicable data protection regulations, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your personal data. You also have the right to restrict or object to the processing of your data.
contact.org: Algiers Ski and Mountain Sports League (LASSM)
contact.address: Gymnase Abdelghani Hazem, Bab Ezzouar, Algiers

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Electronic Payment
terms.subtitle: MOUFLON 2026

identification.title: Seller Identification
identification.text: Legal name: Algiers Ski and Mountain Sports League (LASSM). Legal form: Association. No commercial registry or tax identification number. Address: Gymnase Abdelghani Hazem, Bab Ezzouar, Algiers. Website: tmo.lassm.dz. Email: contact@lassm.dz. Bank: BNA (Banque Nationale d'Algerie).

object.title: Purpose
object.text: These terms and conditions govern the electronic payment for registration to the MOUFLON 2026 trail running event, processed through the SATIM payment gateway.

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
paymentMethods.text: Payments are accepted exclusively in Algerian Dinars (DZD). Accepted cards: CIB or EDAHABIA, processed through the SATIM secure payment platform. Bank card details are entered directly on the SATIM platform and are never transmitted to or stored by the organizer.

withdrawal.title: Right of Withdrawal
withdrawal.text: The buyer may cancel the transaction at any time before the SATIM payment validation step. Once bank authorization has been granted, the transaction is final and irreversible.

validation.title: Transaction Validation
validation.text: Registration is considered final upon receipt of bank authorization and electronic confirmation. The participant will receive a confirmation email with their registration details.

amount.title: Amount
amount.text: The amount charged corresponds exactly to the price displayed on the registration page at the time of payment.

proof.title: Proof of Transaction
proof.text: Electronic records stored by SATIM constitute proof of the transaction. The confirmation email and the payment receipt serve as proof of payment. In the event of a dispute, bank records shall prevail.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.text: No refund will be issued except in the case of force majeure or administrative cancellation of the event by the organizer. Approved refunds will be credited back to the original payment card. Refund processing time is approximately 90 days.

dispute.title: Disputes
dispute.text: In the event of a payment dispute, the buyer must contact the bank that issued their card, in accordance with Algerian banking regulations in force.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.text: In accordance with Law 18-07 on the protection of personal data, the buyer has the right to access, rectify, and object to the processing of their personal data.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By clicking "Pay", the buyer expressly acknowledges having read and accepted these terms and conditions of electronic payment in their entirety.

editor.title: Site Editor
editor.text: This website is published by the Algiers Ski and Mountain Sports League (LASSM).
editor.address: Gymnase Abdelghani Hazem, Bab Ezzouar, Algiers

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.text: This website is hosted by DZSecurity.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.text: All content on this website (texts, images, graphics, logos, icons, etc.) is the property of the association, unless otherwise stated. Partner trademarks and logos remain the property of their respective owners.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: This website may request your acceptance of cookies for statistical purposes. You may configure your browser to refuse cookies, though some features of the site may not function correctly as a result.
